        var miniStyle = "listcard";
        var miniStylePerPost = {};
        var miniSettingsPerPost = {};

        // Configurazione badge dual per post (per JS fallback quando post_thumbnail_html non scatta)
        var badgeConfigPerPost = {"300045":{"leftText":"GUERRA IN IRAN","leftBg":"#ffd700","leftColor":"#000000","rightText":"DIRETTA","rightBg":"#dc2626","rightColor":"#ffffff","showDot":true,"dotColor":"#ffffff","dotSpacing":14,"dotSize":8,"position":"top-left","offsetY":40,"fontSize":13,"leftFontSize":null,"rightFontSize":null,"leftFontWeight":700,"rightFontWeight":700,"padding":8,"gap":0},"299637":{"leftText":"Guerra in Iran","leftBg":"#feea0b","leftColor":"#080808","rightText":"DIRETTA","rightBg":"#f22c2c","rightColor":"#ffffff","showDot":true,"dotColor":"#ffffff","dotSpacing":10,"dotSize":12,"position":"top-left","offsetY":45,"fontSize":12,"leftFontSize":12,"rightFontSize":12,"leftFontWeight":700,"rightFontWeight":700,"padding":7,"gap":0}};

        function findArticle(postId) {
            var el = document.querySelector('.post-' + postId + ', [class*="post-' + postId + '"], article[data-id="' + postId + '"]');
            if (el) return el;
            // Fallback: cerca anche classi JNews specifiche per categorie/archivi
            var jnewsSel = document.querySelector('.jeg_pl_lg_2 .post-' + postId + ', .jeg_pl_md_2 .post-' + postId + ', .jeg_postblock .post-' + postId);
            if (jnewsSel) return jnewsSel;
            var url = null;
            for (var u in liveUrls) { if (liveUrls[u] == postId) { url = u; break; } }
            if (!url) return null;
            // Cerca link con e senza trailing slash
            var urlNoSlash = url.replace(/\/$/, '');
            var links = document.querySelectorAll('a[href="' + url + '"], a[href="' + urlNoSlash + '"], a[href="' + urlNoSlash + '/"]');
            for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) {
                var art = links[i].closest('article, .jeg_post, [class*="jeg_post"], .jeg_pl_lg_box, .jeg_pl_md_box, .jeg_pl_sm, [class*="jeg_pl_"]');
                if (art) return art;
            }
            return null;
        }

        // --- BADGE LIVE ---
        function buildDualBadgeHtml(cfg) {
            var posParts = cfg.position.split('-');
            var vert = posParts[0], horiz = posParts[1];
            var style = 'position:absolute !important;z-index:999 !important;display:flex;gap:' + cfg.gap + 'px;';
            style += (vert === 'bottom' ? 'bottom' : 'top') + ':' + cfg.offsetY + 'px;';
            style += (horiz === 'left' ? 'left' : 'right') + ':0px;';
            var padH = Math.round(cfg.padding * 1.8);
            var lFs = cfg.leftFontSize || cfg.fontSize;
            var rFs = cfg.rightFontSize || cfg.fontSize;
            var lFw = cfg.leftFontWeight || 700;
            var rFw = cfg.rightFontWeight || 700;
            var baseStyle = 'padding:' + cfg.padding + 'px ' + padH + 'px;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;line-height:1;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,sans-serif;';
            var leftHtml = '';
            if (cfg.leftText && cfg.leftText.trim()) {
                leftHtml = '<div style="background:' + cfg.leftBg + ';color:' + cfg.leftColor + ';font-size:' + lFs + 'px;font-weight:' + lFw + ';' + baseStyle + 'display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">' + cfg.leftText + '</div>';
            }
            var dotR = (cfg.dotSize || 8) / 2;
            var ringR = dotR + 3;
            var dotHtml = '';
            if (cfg.showDot) {
                dotHtml = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="lbs-live-svg" aria-hidden="true"><circle class="lbs-ring" cx="12" cy="12" r="' + ringR + '" style="stroke:' + cfg.dotColor + ';"></circle><circle class="lbs-dot" cx="12" cy="12" r="' + dotR + '" style="fill:' + cfg.dotColor + ';"></circle></svg>';
            }
            var rightHtml = '<div class="lbs-dual-badge__right" style="background:' + cfg.rightBg + ';color:' + cfg.rightColor + ';font-size:' + rFs + 'px;font-weight:' + rFw + ';' + baseStyle + 'display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:' + (cfg.dotSpacing || 14) + 'px;">' + dotHtml + '<span class="lbs-dual-badge__label">' + cfg.rightText + '</span></div>';
            return '<div class="lbs-dual-badge" style="' + style + '">' + leftHtml + rightHtml + '</div>';
        }

        liveIds.forEach(function(postId){
            var article = findArticle(postId);
            if (!article) return;
            if (!article.classList.contains('lbs-live')) article.classList.add('lbs-live');

            var thumb = article.querySelector('.jeg_thumb, .jeg_post_thumbnail, .jeg_featured, .jeg_thumb_wrapper, [class*="jeg_thumb"], .thumbnail-container, .post-thumbnail, .entry-thumbnail, figure.wp-block-post-featured-image, .thumbnail, .news-thumb, .post_thumbnail, .wp-post-image');
            if (!thumb) return;
            // Skip se badge già presente
            if (thumb.querySelector('.lbs-dual-badge') || thumb.querySelector('.live-badge-overlay')) return;

            // Ensure thumb is positioning context
            var thumbPos = getComputedStyle(thumb).position;
            if (thumbPos === 'static') thumb.style.position = 'relative';

            // Force overflow visible on thumb and ancestors (up to 15 levels) to prevent clipping
            thumb.style.overflow = 'visible';
            thumb.style.clipPath = 'none';
            thumb.style.contain = 'none';
            var ancestor = thumb.parentElement;
            for (var lvl = 0; lvl < 15 && ancestor && ancestor !== document.body; lvl++) {
                var cs = getComputedStyle(ancestor);
                if (cs.overflow !== 'visible' || cs.clipPath !== 'none') {
                    ancestor.style.overflow = 'visible';
                    ancestor.style.clipPath = 'none';
                    ancestor.style.contain = 'none';
                }
                ancestor = ancestor.parentElement;
            }

            // Inietta badge dentro il thumb
            var cfg = badgeConfigPerPost[postId];
            if (cfg) {
                cfg.offsetY = parseInt(cfg.offsetY) || 0;
                thumb.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', buildDualBadgeHtml(cfg));
            } else {
                // Fallback: badge classico "IN DIRETTA"
                var badge = document.createElement('div');
                badge.className = 'live-badge-overlay';
                badge.innerHTML = '<span class="live-badge-pill"><span class="live-badge-pill__dot"></span>IN DIRETTA</span>';
                thumb.appendChild(badge);
            }
        });

        // --- TITOLO SOPRA IMMAGINE HERO (Homepage) ---
        // Usa findArticle() per trovare l'articolo live, poi controlla se è in un contesto hero/primo piano
        var isHP = document.body.classList.contains('home') || document.body.classList.contains('blog');
        var isMobileViewport = window.innerWidth <= 480;
        if (isHP && !isMobileViewport) {
            console.log('[LBS] Homepage detected (desktop/tablet), checking for hero title restructuring...');
            liveIds.forEach(function(postId){
                var article = findArticle(postId);
                if (!article) {
                    console.log('[LBS] Hero title: article not found for post', postId);
                    return;
                }
                // Evita doppia esecuzione
                if (article.querySelector('.lbs-hero-title-above') || (article.previousElementSibling && article.previousElementSibling.classList && article.previousElementSibling.classList.contains('lbs-hero-title-above'))) return;
                // Verifica se è in un contesto hero / primo piano (stessi selettori usati per mini-timeline)
                var heroContainer = article.closest('.jeg_heroblock, .jeg_postbig, .jeg_hero_wrapper, [class*="jeg_hero"], .jeg_slider_wrapper, [class*="heroblock"]');
                if (!heroContainer) {
                    // Fallback: controlla se è nel blocco "Primo Piano" tramite heading
                    var postblock = article.closest('.jeg_postblock, .code-block');
                    if (postblock) {
                        var prev = postblock.previousElementSibling;
                        if (prev && prev.classList && prev.classList.contains('jeg_block_heading') && prev.textContent && prev.textContent.match(/primo\s*piano/i)) {
                            heroContainer = postblock;
                        }
                    }
                }
                if (!heroContainer) {
                    console.log('[LBS] Hero title: article', postId, 'is not in hero/primo piano context. Classes:', article.className);
                    return;
                }
                console.log('[LBS] Hero title: found article', postId, 'in hero context:', heroContainer.className);
                // Cerca il titolo e i metadati nell'overlay
                var postInfo = article.querySelector('.jeg_post_info, .jeg_postblock_content');
                var titleEl = article.querySelector('.jeg_post_title, h2.jeg_post_title');
                if (!titleEl) titleEl = article.querySelector('h2, h3');
                if (!titleEl) {
                    console.log('[LBS] Hero title: no title element found for post', postId);
                    return;
                }
                var metaEl = article.querySelector('.jeg_post_meta, [class*="jeg_post_meta"]');
                // Crea blocco titolo sopra l'immagine
                var wrapper = document.createElement('div');
                wrapper.className = 'lbs-hero-title-above';
                wrapper.style.cssText = 'padding:0 0 12px;';
                // Clona il titolo
                var h2 = document.createElement('h2');
                h2.style.cssText = 'font-size:1.68rem;font-weight:700;line-height:1.3;color:#111;margin:0 0 6px;font-family:inherit;';
                var link = titleEl.tagName === 'A' ? titleEl : titleEl.querySelector('a');
                if (link) {
                    var a = document.createElement('a');
                    a.href = link.href;
                    a.textContent = link.textContent;
                    a.className = 'lbs-hero-title-link';
                    a.style.cssText = 'color:#111 !important;text-decoration:none;transition:text-decoration 0.2s;';
                    h2.appendChild(a);
                } else {
                    h2.textContent = titleEl.textContent;
                }
                wrapper.appendChild(h2);
                // Meta (di Redazione) rimosso — non serve sotto il titolo
                // Inserisci prima del thumb/immagine
                var thumbEl = article.querySelector('.jeg_thumb, .jeg_post_thumbnail, .jeg_featured, [class*="jeg_thumb"]');
                if (thumbEl) {
                    thumbEl.parentNode.insertBefore(wrapper, thumbEl);
                } else {
                    article.insertBefore(wrapper, article.firstChild);
                }
                // Rimuovi fisicamente titolo e meta dall'overlay originale (mantieni solo categoria e badge)
                var allPostInfos = article.querySelectorAll('.jeg_post_info, .jeg_postblock_content');
                allPostInfos.forEach(function(pi){
                    // Rimuovi titoli (h2, h3, .jeg_post_title)
                    var titles = pi.querySelectorAll('.jeg_post_title, h2, h3');
                    titles.forEach(function(t){ t.style.display = 'none'; t.remove(); });
                    // Rimuovi meta (DI REDAZIONE ecc)
                    var metas = pi.querySelectorAll('.jeg_post_meta, [class*="jeg_post_meta"]');
                    metas.forEach(function(m){ m.style.display = 'none'; m.remove(); });
                    // Rimuovi excerpt se presente
                    var excerpts = pi.querySelectorAll('.jeg_post_excerpt');
                    excerpts.forEach(function(e){ e.style.display = 'none'; e.remove(); });
                });
                console.log('[LBS] Hero title successfully moved above image for post', postId);
            });

            // Fallback CSS globale: nasconde titolo/meta nell'overlay di TUTTI i blocchi hero live
            // Iniettato SEMPRE, fuori dal forEach, per coprire anche articoli non trovati via JS
            if (!document.getElementById('lbs-hero-title-hide')) {
                var style = document.createElement('style');
                style.id = 'lbs-hero-title-hide';
                // Selettori molto ampi: copre jeg_heroblock, jeg_postbig, jeg_hero_wrapper e varianti
                style.textContent =
                    '.lbs-live .jeg_post_info .jeg_post_title,' +

                    '.lbs-live .jeg_post_info h3,' +
                    '.lbs-live .jeg_post_info .jeg_post_excerpt,' +
                    '.lbs-live .jeg_postblock_content .jeg_post_title,' +
                    '.lbs-live .jeg_postblock_content h2,' +
                    '.lbs-live .jeg_postblock_content h3,' +
                    '.lbs-live .jeg_postblock_content .jeg_post_meta,' +
                    '.lbs-live .jeg_postblock_content .jeg_post_excerpt,' +
                    '.jeg_heroblock .lbs-live .jeg_post_title,' +
                    '.jeg_heroblock .lbs-live .jeg_post_meta,' +

                    '.jeg_heroblock .lbs-live h3,' +
                    '.jeg_heroblock .lbs-live .jeg_post_excerpt,' +
                    '.jeg_postbig .lbs-live .jeg_post_title,' +
                    '.jeg_postbig .lbs-live .jeg_post_meta,' +
                    '.jeg_postbig .lbs-live h2:not(.lbs-hero-title-above h2),' +
                    '.jeg_postbig .lbs-live h3,' +
                    '.jeg_postbig .lbs-live .jeg_post_excerpt,' +
                    // Selettori senza .lbs-live per casi dove la classe non viene aggiunta
                    '.jeg_heroblock .jeg_post_info .jeg_post_title,' +
                    '.jeg_heroblock .jeg_post_info .jeg_post_meta,' +
                    '.jeg_heroblock .jeg_post_info h2,' +
                    '.jeg_heroblock .jeg_post_info h3,' +
                    '.jeg_heroblock .jeg_post_info .jeg_post_excerpt,' +
                    '.jeg_postbig .jeg_post_info .jeg_post_title,' +
                    '.jeg_postbig .jeg_post_info .jeg_post_meta,' +
                    '.jeg_postbig .jeg_post_info h2,' +
                    '.jeg_postbig .jeg_post_info h3,' +
                    '.jeg_postbig .jeg_post_info .jeg_post_excerpt,' +
                    // Nasconde badge categoria (es. ESTERI) dall'hero
                    '.jeg_heroblock .jeg_post_category,' +
                    '.jeg_postbig .jeg_post_category,' +
                    '.lbs-live .jeg_post_category,' +
                    '[class*="jeg_hero"] .jeg_post_category' +
                    '{ display:none !important; }' +
                    // Proteggi il titolo clonato sopra
                    '.lbs-hero-title-above, .lbs-hero-title-above * { display:block !important; visibility:visible !important; opacity:1 !important; }' +
                    '.lbs-hero-title-above h2 { color:#111 !important; }' +
                    '.lbs-hero-title-link, .lbs-hero-title-link:visited, .lbs-hero-title-link:active, .lbs-hero-title-link:focus { color:#111 !important; text-decoration:none !important; }' +
                    '.lbs-hero-title-link:hover { text-decoration:underline !important; color:#111 !important; }' +
                    '.lbs-hero-meta-above { color:#6b7280 !important; font-size:inherit !important; text-transform:none !important; display:inline !important; visibility:visible !important; opacity:1 !important; }' +
                    '.lbs-hero-meta-above * { pointer-events:auto !important; display:inline !important; }';
                document.head.appendChild(style);
            }

            // MutationObserver: JNews potrebbe re-renderizzare i blocchi hero dopo il nostro script
            // Ri-esegui la rimozione titoli quando il DOM cambia
            // Ottimizzato: debounce per ridurre il lavoro ripetuto e impatto su INP
            var heroObserverTimer = null;
            var heroObserver = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
                if (heroObserverTimer) return; // Debounce: esegui max 1 volta per frame
                heroObserverTimer = requestAnimationFrame(function() {
                    heroObserverTimer = null;
                    liveIds.forEach(function(postId) {
                        var article = findArticle(postId);
                        if (!article) return;
                        if (article.querySelector('.lbs-hero-title-above') || (article.previousElementSibling && article.previousElementSibling.classList && article.previousElementSibling.classList.contains('lbs-hero-title-above'))) {
                            var allPostInfos = article.querySelectorAll('.jeg_post_info, .jeg_postblock_content');
                            allPostInfos.forEach(function(pi) {
                                // Non toccare elementi dentro .lbs-hero-title-above (nostro clone)
                                if (pi.closest('.lbs-hero-title-above')) return;
                                pi.querySelectorAll('.jeg_post_title, h2, h3').forEach(function(t) { if (!t.closest('.lbs-hero-title-above')) t.remove(); });
                                pi.querySelectorAll('.jeg_post_meta, [class*="jeg_post_meta"]').forEach(function(m) { if (!m.closest('.lbs-hero-title-above') && !m.closest('.lbs-hero-meta-above')) m.remove(); });
                                pi.querySelectorAll('.jeg_post_excerpt').forEach(function(e) { e.remove(); });
                            });
                        }
                    });
                });
            });
            // Osserva solo i contenitori hero per performance (childList only, no subtree attribute changes)
            document.querySelectorAll('.jeg_heroblock, .jeg_postbig, [class*="jeg_hero"]').forEach(function(hero) {
                heroObserver.observe(hero, { childList: true, subtree: true });
            });
        }

        // --- JS fallback: force overflow:visible on ancestors up to hero container ---
        // Only affects elements inside hero/primo piano blocks; max 10 levels to avoid side effects
        function forceOverflowVisible(el) {
            var heroSelectors = '.jeg_heroblock, .jeg_postbig, [class*="jeg_hero"], .jeg_heromodule';
            var stopSelectors = heroSelectors + ', .jeg_sidebar, .widget, aside, [class*="sidebar"], footer, .jeg_footer, .jeg_main_content, .jeg_container, body';
            // Only run if the element is actually inside a hero block
            if (!el.closest || !el.closest(heroSelectors)) return;
            var node = el;
            var maxDepth = 10;
            while (node && node !== document.body && maxDepth-- > 0) {
                node.style.overflow = 'visible';
                if (node.matches && node.matches(heroSelectors)) break;
                // Safety: stop if we hit a layout container that should NOT be modified
                if (node.matches && node.matches(stopSelectors)) break;
                node = node.parentElement;
            }
        }

        // --- Funzione per posizionare la mini-timeline (SSR o JS-generated) ---
        // Cerca prima HTML pre-renderizzato dal server (lbs-ssr-mini), altrimenti genera da JS
        function placeMiniTimeline(postId, items) {
            var article = findArticle(postId);
            if (!article) return;

            var isCategoryArchive = document.body.classList.contains('category') || document.body.classList.contains('archive') || document.body.classList.contains('tag');
            if (isCategoryArchive) return;
            var isHomepage = document.body.classList.contains('home') || document.body.classList.contains('blog');
            var isSingle = document.body.classList.contains('single');
            if (!isHomepage && !isSingle) return;

            if (isHomepage) {
                var isInSidebar = article.closest('.jeg_sidebar, .widget, aside, [class*="sidebar"]');
                if (isInSidebar) return;
                var isInPrimoPiano = article.closest('.jeg_postbig');
                var isHero = article.closest('.jeg_heroblock, .jeg_hero_wrapper, [class*="jeg_hero"], .jeg_slider_wrapper, [class*="heroblock"], [class*="hero_"]');
                if (!isInPrimoPiano && !isHero) {
                    var postblock = article.closest('.jeg_postblock, .code-block');
                    if (postblock) {
                        var prev = postblock.previousElementSibling;
                        if (prev && prev.classList && prev.classList.contains('jeg_block_heading') && prev.querySelector('.primo_piano, .prima_pagina')) isInPrimoPiano = true;
                        var codeBlock = postblock.closest('.code-block');
                        if (codeBlock && codeBlock.querySelector('.primo_piano, .prima_pagina')) isInPrimoPiano = true;
                    }
                }
                if (!isInPrimoPiano && !isHero) return;
            }

            var target = article.querySelector('.jeg_postblock_content, .jeg_post_excerpt, .entry-summary, .post-excerpt, .excerpt, .entry-content, [class*="excerpt"], [class*="summary"]');
            if (!target) target = article;

            // Rimuovi mini-timeline esistente
            var existing = article.querySelector('.lbs-mini-updates');
            if (existing) existing.remove();
            var heroContainerCheck = article.closest('.jeg_heroblock, .jeg_postbig, [class*="jeg_hero_"]');
            if (heroContainerCheck) {
                var nextEl = heroContainerCheck.nextElementSibling;
                while (nextEl && nextEl.classList && nextEl.classList.contains('lbs-mini-updates')) {
                    var toRemove = nextEl;
                    nextEl = nextEl.nextElementSibling;
                    toRemove.remove();
                }
            }

            // Cerca HTML pre-renderizzato dal server (SSR)
            var ssrEl = document.querySelector('.lbs-ssr-mini[data-post-id="' + postId + '"]');
            if (ssrEl) {
                // Sposta l'elemento SSR nella posizione corretta
                var effectiveStyle = (miniStylePerPost[postId]) || miniStyle;
                if (effectiveStyle === 'overlay' || effectiveStyle === 'listcard') {
                    var heroContainer = article.closest('.jeg_heroblock, .jeg_postbig, [class*="jeg_hero_"]');
                    if (heroContainer) {
                        heroContainer.parentNode.insertBefore(ssrEl, heroContainer.nextSibling);
                    } else {
                        var thumb = article.querySelector('.jeg_thumb, .jeg_featured, .post-thumbnail, .wp-block-post-featured-image, .thumbnail, .news-thumb');
                        if (thumb) {
                            thumb.parentNode.insertBefore(ssrEl, thumb.nextSibling);
                            if (effectiveStyle === 'overlay') forceOverflowVisible(thumb);
                        } else {
                            target.appendChild(ssrEl);
                        }
                    }
                } else {
                    target.appendChild(ssrEl);
                }
                ssrEl.style.display = '';
                return;
            }

            // Fallback: genera da JS (per polling updates)
            var html = '';
            var effectiveStyle = (miniStylePerPost[postId]) || miniStyle;
            var ps = (miniSettingsPerPost && miniSettingsPerPost[postId]) || {};
            var dotColorAttr = ps.dotColor ? ' style="--lbs-listcard-dot-color:' + ps.dotColor + '"' : '';
            var maxItems = ps.itemsCount || 5;
            var displayItems = items.slice(0, maxItems);
            var tf = ps.timeFormat || ''; // 'absolute', 'relative', or '' (auto)

            function getTime(item, style) {
                if (tf === 'absolute') return item.ago;
                if (tf === 'relative') return item.ago_rel || item.ago;
                // Auto: overlay/listcard=relative, classic=absolute
                return (style === 'overlay' || style === 'listcard') ? (item.ago_rel || item.ago) : item.ago;
            }

            if (effectiveStyle === 'overlay') {
                var label = ps.headerLabel || 'AGGIORNAMENTI LIVE';
                html = '<div class="lbs-mini-updates lbs-mini-updates--overlay"' + dotColorAttr + '>';
                html += '<div class="lbs-mini-updates__header"><svg class="lbs-mini-updates__dot" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="4" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.6"><animate attributeName="r" values="5;8;8" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/><animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.6;0;0" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></circle></svg> ' + label + '</div>';
                html += '<ul class="lbs-mini-updates__list">';
                displayItems.forEach(function(item){
                    var t = getTime(item, 'overlay');
                    html += '<li class="lbs-mini-updates__item">';
                    html += '<span class="lbs-mini-updates__item-dot"></span>';
                    html += '<span class="lbs-mini-updates__time">' + t + (tf !== 'absolute' ? ':' : '') + '</span>';
                    html += '<a href="' + item.url + '" class="lbs-mini-updates__title">' + item.title + '</a>';
                    html += '</li>';
                });
                html += '</ul></div>';
            } else if (effectiveStyle === 'listcard') {
                var label = ps.headerLabel || 'DIRETTA';
                html = '<div class="lbs-mini-updates lbs-mini-updates--listcard"' + dotColorAttr + '>';
                html += '<div class="lbs-mini-updates__header"><svg class="lbs-mini-updates__dot" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="4" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.6"><animate attributeName="r" values="5;8;8" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/><animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.6;0;0" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></circle></svg> ' + label + '</div>';
                html += '<ul class="lbs-mini-updates__list">';
                displayItems.forEach(function(item){
                    var t = getTime(item, 'listcard');
                    html += '<li class="lbs-mini-updates__item">';
                    html += '<span class="lbs-mini-updates__item-dot"></span>';
                    html += '<div class="lbs-mini-updates__item-content">';
                    html += '<span class="lbs-mini-updates__time">' + t + '</span>';
                    html += '<a href="' + item.url + '" class="lbs-mini-updates__title">' + item.title + '</a>';
                    html += '</div></li>';
                });
                html += '</ul></div>';
            } else {
                var label = ps.headerLabel || 'IN DIRETTA';
                html = '<div class="lbs-mini-updates lbs-mini-updates--classic"' + dotColorAttr + '>';
                html += '<div class="lbs-mini-updates__header"><svg class="lbs-mini-updates__dot" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="4" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.6"><animate attributeName="r" values="5;8;8" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/><animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.6;0;0" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></circle></svg> ' + label + '</div>';
                html += '<ul class="lbs-mini-updates__list">';
                displayItems.forEach(function(item){
                    var t = getTime(item, 'classic');
                    html += '<li class="lbs-mini-updates__item">';
                    html += '<span class="lbs-mini-updates__item-dot"></span>';
                    html += '<span class="lbs-mini-updates__time">' + t + '</span>';
                    html += '<a href="' + item.url + '" class="lbs-mini-updates__title">' + item.title + '</a>';
                    html += '</li>';
                });
                html += '</ul></div>';
            }

            if (effectiveStyle === 'overlay' || effectiveStyle === 'listcard') {
                var heroContainer = article.closest('.jeg_heroblock, .jeg_postbig, [class*="jeg_hero_"]');
                if (heroContainer) {
                    heroContainer.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', html);
                    return;
                }
                var thumb = article.querySelector('.jeg_thumb, .jeg_featured, .post-thumbnail, .wp-block-post-featured-image, .thumbnail, .news-thumb');
                if (thumb) {
                    thumb.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', html);
                    if (effectiveStyle === 'overlay') forceOverflowVisible(thumb);
                    return;
                }
            }
            target.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', html);
        }

        // --- Render iniziale: posiziona SSR HTML o genera da JS ---
        if (liveData && Object.keys(liveData).length) {
            Object.keys(liveData).forEach(function(postId){
                placeMiniTimeline(postId, liveData[postId]);
            });
        }

        // --- Polling: aggiorna mini-timeline ogni 20 secondi ---
        var isHomepage = document.body.classList.contains('home') || document.body.classList.contains('blog');
        if (isHomepage && lbsRestBase) {
            // Salva riferimenti agli article trovati al primo render per riuso nel polling
            var articleCache = {};
            Object.keys(liveData || {}).forEach(function(pid){
                var art = findArticle(pid);
                if (art) articleCache[pid] = art;
            });

            function pollMiniTimeline(){
                var url = lbsRestBase + '/mini-timeline?_=' + Date.now();
                fetch(url, { credentials: 'same-origin', cache: 'no-store' })
                    .then(function(r){
                        if (!r.ok) { console.warn('[LBS] mini-timeline poll failed:', r.status); return null; }
                        return r.json();
                    })
                    .then(function(data){
                        if (!data) return;
                        Object.keys(data).forEach(function(postId){
                            // Aggiorna direttamente il DOM della mini-timeline esistente
                            var article = articleCache[postId] || findArticle(postId);
                            if (!article) return;
                            articleCache[postId] = article;

                            // Cerca overlay: prima dentro article, poi come sibling del hero
                            var existing = article.querySelector('.lbs-mini-updates');
                            if (!existing) {
                                var hc = article.closest('.jeg_heroblock, .jeg_postbig, [class*="jeg_hero_"]');
                                if (hc && hc.nextElementSibling && hc.nextElementSibling.classList && hc.nextElementSibling.classList.contains('lbs-mini-updates')) {
                                    existing = hc.nextElementSibling;
                                }
                            }
                            if (existing) {
                                // Aggiorna solo la lista, non ricreare tutto
                                var list = existing.querySelector('.lbs-mini-updates__list');
                                if (list) {
                                    var items = data[postId];
                                    var es = (miniStylePerPost[postId]) || miniStyle;
                                    var ps = (miniSettingsPerPost && miniSettingsPerPost[postId]) || {};
                                    var tf = ps.timeFormat || '';
                                    function getPollTime(item, style) {
                                        if (tf === 'absolute') return item.ago;
                                        if (tf === 'relative') return item.ago_rel || item.ago;
                                        return (style === 'overlay' || style === 'listcard') ? (item.ago_rel || item.ago) : item.ago;
                                    }
                                    var html = '';
                                    items.forEach(function(item){
                                        var t = getPollTime(item, es);
                                        if (es === 'listcard') {
                                            html += '<li class="lbs-mini-updates__item">';
                                            html += '<span class="lbs-mini-updates__item-dot"></span>';
                                            html += '<div class="lbs-mini-updates__item-content">';
                                            html += '<span class="lbs-mini-updates__time">' + t + '</span>';
                                            html += '<a href="' + item.url + '" class="lbs-mini-updates__title">' + item.title + '</a>';
                                            html += '</div></li>';
                                        } else {
                                            html += '<li class="lbs-mini-updates__item">';
                                            html += '<span class="lbs-mini-updates__item-dot"></span>';
                                            html += '<span class="lbs-mini-updates__time">' + t + (es === 'overlay' && tf !== 'absolute' ? ':' : '') + '</span>';
                                            html += '<a href="' + item.url + '" class="lbs-mini-updates__title">' + item.title + '</a>';
                                            html += '</li>';
                                        }
                                    });
                                    list.innerHTML = html;
                                }
                            } else {
                                // Se non esiste ancora, prova a crearla
                                placeMiniTimeline(postId, data[postId]);
                            }
                        });
                    })
                    .catch(function(e){ console.warn('[LBS] mini-timeline poll error:', e); });
            }

            // Polling differito: inizia dopo che LCP è stato raggiunto
            // Prima poll dopo 30s (era 5s), poi ogni 30s (era 20s) — riduce carico rete durante caricamento
            setInterval(pollMiniTimeline, 30000);
            setTimeout(pollMiniTimeline, 30000);
        }
    })();</script> <style id="jeg_dynamic_css" type="text/css" data-type="jeg_custom-css">.jeg_container, .jeg_content, .jeg_boxed .jeg_main .jeg_container, .jeg_autoload_separator { background-color document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const allArticles = document.querySelectorAll('article');

    allArticles.forEach(article => {
        const authorLink = article.querySelector('.jeg_meta_author a');
        if (!authorLink) return;

        const currentAuthor = authorLink.textContent.trim();
        const isFormatVideo = article.classList.contains('format-video');
        const isInsidePostblock23 = article.closest('.jeg_postblock_23') !== null;
        const redazioneUrl = 'https://www.alanews.it/redazione';

        if (isFormatVideo && !isInsidePostblock23) {
            // Caso 1: video (escluso postblock_23) → imposta Redazione con link
            const newLink = document.createElement('a');
            newLink.href = redazioneUrl;
            newLink.textContent = 'Redazione';
            authorLink.parentNode.replaceChild(newLink, authorLink);

        } else if (currentAuthor === 'Redazione') {
            // Caso 2: autore già Redazione → sostituisci link con quello corretto
            const newLink = document.createElement('a');
            newLink.href = redazioneUrl;
            newLink.textContent = 'Redazione';
            authorLink.parentNode.replaceChild(newLink, authorLink);
        }

        // Caso 3: altri articoli → non modificare
    });
});</script><script type="text/javascript">;!function(){"use strict";window.jnews=window.jnews||{},window.jnews.first_load=window.jnews.first_load||{},window.jnews.first_load=function(){var e=this,t=jnews.library,n="object"==typeof jnews&&"object"==typeof jnews.library;e.data=null,e.run_ajax=!0,e.run_loginregister=!0,e.clear=function(){e.run_ajax=!0,e.run_loginregister=!0,e.data=null},e.init=function(){n&&(t.globalBody.querySelectorAll(".jeg_popup_account").length&&jnews.loginregister&&e.run_loginregister&&(e.run_loginregister=!1,jnews.loginregister.init(),jnews.loginregister.hook_form()),jfla.length&&e.run_ajax&&(e.run_ajax=!1,e.do_ajax({action:"jnews_first_load_action",jnews_id:jnewsoption.postid,load_action:jfla})))},e.update_counter=function(){if(n){var o={total_view:t.globalBody.querySelectorAll(".jeg_share_stats .jeg_views_count .counts"),total_share:t.globalBody.querySelectorAll(".jeg_share_stats .jeg_share_count .counts"),total_comment:t.globalBody.querySelectorAll(".jeg_meta_comment a span")};t.forEach(Object.entries(e.data.counter),(function([e,n]){o[e].length&&t.forEach(o[e],(function(e,o){t.setText(e,n)}))}))}},e.do_ajax=function(o){if(n){var a=new XMLHttpRequest;a.onreadystatechange=function(){XMLHttpRequest.DONE===a.readyState&&200==a.status&&(e.data=JSON.parse(a.responseText),e.data.counter&&"object"==typeof e.data.counter&&e.update_counter())},a.open("POST",jnews_ajax_url,!0),a.setRequestHeader("Content-Type","application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8"),a.send(t.httpBuildQuery(o))}}},window.jnews.first_load=new window.jnews.first_load,jnews.first_load.init()}();</script> </body> <script async type="text/javascript" src="https://clickiocmp.com/t/consent_244092.js"></script> <script src="https://s.fluxtech.ai/s/alanews/ads.js" async></script> <script async src="/index.js"></script>  <script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-WT41DC4S4G"></script> <script>window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
